description: Binary assertions for daily-brief output quality. Used by self-improvement loop.

test_cases.prompt: Gi meg brief for i dag
test_cases.expected_output: A complete daily briefing in Norwegian with all sections
assertions: Output starts with 'BRIEF' followed by a date
Contains a 'KALENDER' section
Contains an 'INBOX' section with unread count in parentheses
Contains a 'TASKS' section
All times use HH:MM format (e.g. 08:00, 14:30)
Language is Norwegian (not English section headers or filler text)
Does not contain em dashes (--)
Does not contain the phrase 'Certainly' or 'Great question' or 'I'd be happy to'
Calendar events include time and title on each line
Inbox items are grouped into 'Trenger handling' and 'FYI' subsections
Overdue tasks are marked with [!] prefix
Does not contain 'Sorry' or 'I apologize'
Total output is under 60 lines
Date shown matches actual current date (verified via date command)

test_cases.expected_output: Should trigger daily-brief and produce same format
assertions: Output starts with 'BRIEF' followed by a date
Contains a 'KALENDER' section
Contains an 'INBOX' section
Contains a 'TASKS' section
Language is Norwegian
Does not contain em dashes (--)
All times use HH:MM format

test_cases.prompt: Gi meg brief (simulate: calendar API returns error)
test_cases.expected_output: Brief should still render with available data and note the failure
assertions: Output starts with 'BRIEF' followed by a date
If a section has no data, it notes the failure briefly rather than omitting the section entirely
Other sections (INBOX, TASKS) are still present and populated
Does not contain a full error stacktrace
Does not contain em dashes (--)

test_cases.prompt: Gi meg brief (simulate: two events overlap at 10:00-11:00)
test_cases.expected_output: Brief should flag the scheduling conflict
assertions: Output starts with 'BRIEF' followed by a date
Contains a 'KALENDER' section
Overlapping events are flagged or noted (conflict, dobbeltbooking, or similar warning)
Does not contain em dashes (--)

test_cases.prompt: Gi meg brief for i dag
test_cases.expected_output: Brief includes scheduled reminders for today
assertions: Contains a 'PAMINNELSER I DAG' or 'PAMINNELSER' section if reminders exist for today
Reminder entries include time and description
Does not contain em dashes (--)

scoring.description: Each assertion is true/false. Score = passed / total. Target: 100%.

loop_instructions: Read SKILL.md -> generate output for each test case -> check assertions -> if any fail, propose ONE change to SKILL.md -> re-run -> keep change if score improves, revert if not. Repeat until 100% or interrupted.
